title: SMP Server by Snod
description: A vanilla-friendly bedrock and java compatible minecraft server, with some optimization mods.
body:
# 🧭 SMP Server by Snod

**Snod’s Server** is a lightweight **vanilla-plus Fabric modpack** built specifically for multiplayer servers. It started as a collection of small tweaks and quality-of-life improvements that my friends and I wanted for the game, and a modpack is now the easiest way to scale with regular game updates.

This pack focuses on:
- Better performance and stability for many players
- Support for Bedrock Edition Players  
- Expanded exploration that is still true to vanilla  
- Improved multiplayer features without altering core gameplay  

---

## ✨ What’s Included

### ⚙️ Performance & Scalability
- **Lithium, FerriteCore, Very Many Players**, and the **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine** keep the server fast and responsive, even with lots of players online.

### 🌍 World & Structure Enhancements
- **CliffTree** adds natural terrain details & some fancy new vanilla compatible biomes.  
- **Luki’s Ancient Cities & Strongholds** expand end-game exploration while staying faithful to vanilla design.

### 💾 Multiplayer & Server Features
- **Plasmo Voice** for simple, immersive proximity voice chat.  
- **Geyser** support for Bedrock players to join Java Server.
- **AntiXray** for those pesky X-rayers.

### 🐉 Endgame Improvements
- **True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul** gives the End fight some actual weight.
